name: King Of Pawn Jewelry & Guns
description_short: Family-operated pawn shop in North Lauderdale, FL buying and lending on jewelry, guns, electronics, and valuables since 2001. Open 7 days weekly.
description_long:
King Of Pawn Jewelry & Guns is a family-operated pawn shop located at 5278 State Road 7 in North Lauderdale, Florida, serving the tri-county area since 2001. The business operates as a traditional collateral-based lender, allowing customers to either sell items or receive loans against personal valuables.

The company buys, sells, and provides loans on a broad range of items including jewelry (new and scrap/broken gold), watches, diamonds, firearms, coins, musical instruments, electronics, tools, and motorcycles. They position themselves as a "#1 Gold Buyer" and emphasize competitive pricing. Their service model centers on converting personal assets into immediate cash without credit checks or income verification requirements typical of traditional lending.

Key distinguishing factors include their seven-day-per-week operating schedule (9 AM–7 PM daily), family ownership spanning over 20 years, and willingness to accept diverse collateral types. The website emphasizes customer service with messaging like "We Have Your Best Interest in Mind" and positions the business around the tagline "Unlock Cash With Confidence."

As a pawn operation, this business is best suited for consumers needing immediate short-term cash who have valuable personal items to leverage. The typical pawn transaction involves higher effective costs compared to traditional loans, and customers risk losing items if loans aren't repaid. This is an emergency liquidity solution, not a credit-building tool, and should be considered only after exploring lower-cost alternatives.
pros: Open 7 days a week including weekends and holidays for access
Family-operated business with 20+ years in operation (since 2001)
Accepts wide variety of collateral including jewelry, guns, electronics, instruments, tools, and motorcycles
No credit check or income verification required for pawn loans
Same-day or immediate cash availability without application delays
Buys gold and jewelry directly at competitive prices as alternative to loans
Local brick-and-mortar location with direct phone contact available
cons: Pawn loans carry significantly higher effective interest rates and costs than traditional personal loans
Risk of losing personal items if loan is not repaid by deadline
Website lacks transparency on interest rates, terms, repayment periods, or loan amounts
No information provided about specific fees, storage charges, or redemption terms
Limited online presence—no online application, pricing calculator, or detailed terms disclosure
best_for: Consumers with valuable jewelry, electronics, or collectibles needing immediate short-term cash
Individuals who cannot qualify for traditional loans due to poor credit or lack of income documentation
People seeking to sell gold, jewelry, or other valuables quickly without dealer markup
Gun owners looking to sell or temporarily pawn firearms in a licensed, legal establishment
diagnosis: Best for consumers facing immediate cash needs who own valuable items they can pledge as collateral and are willing to accept the higher effective costs of pawn lending. Primary caveat: pawn loans are significantly more expensive than personal loans or credit union alternatives and should only be considered when traditional lending is unavailable and the need is urgent.
services: Pawn loans on jewelry and watches
Pawn loans on firearms and guns
Pawn loans on electronics and tools
Gold and precious metal buying (scrap, broken, or intact)
